work_unit: HV-002 fact_checker.py data_year recency 时区统一 UTC
situation: audit-cycle-state fix-in-progress, pending_count=8. Next pending finding HV-002 (HIGH): script-verifier/fact_checker.py line 378 used date.today().year (local timezone) to compute data age for QAH-05 recency note, while verified_at (line 192), generated_at (line 622/647) all use datetime.now(timezone.utc). Cross-timezone deploys around New Year would produce ±1 year discrepancy in recency warnings.
action: Replaced 'from datetime import date; age = date.today().year - int(data_year)' with 'age = datetime.now(timezone.utc).year - int(data_year)' reusing already-imported datetime+timezone. Added inline comment referencing HV-002 and alignment rationale.
